claims.summary: Reconnect handling should preserve the last known spectral foothold rather than clear it into a vacuum.
claims.disposition: verify connection trace mutation leaves latest telemetry intact across disconnect and backoff cycles

claims.summary: Stale or ghost hearing must not be mistaken for a stable field.
claims.disposition: verify heartbeat and pressure-source evidence explicitly mark stale hearing and refuse decompression inference

claims.summary: Forced disconnects or high-velocity cascades could expose reconnect or state-lock latency.
claims.disposition: route bounded delayed-stream shutdown and high-rate fixture tests without inducing live pressure or changing backoff
